title: Bar Chart
description: Create a bar chart to visualize counts of categorical data.
problemStatement:
Count and show! Using the built-in `mpg` data set, create a bar chart of the `class` column.

**Requirement:** Use `ggplot()` and `geom_bar()`.
hints: `geom_bar()` automatically counts cases for categorical variables.
expectedOutput: A ggplot object representing a bar chart
solutionCode:
library(ggplot2)
plot <- ggplot(mpg, aes(x = class)) + geom_bar()
print(plot)
